name: Easy M/w Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave chocolate, butter, and milk in a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl for 1 to 2 minutes at MED-HIGH (70%) until the butter looks melted.
2. Stir until smooth and chocolate is melted.
3. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until the mixture is smooth and creamy but not crumbly.
5. Stir in peanuts.
6. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
7. Chill to firm (20 minutes).
8. Cut into squares.
